zh.Stelen, Geel, Antwerp, Belgium: 比利時安特維爾吉爾斯特倫
zh.lifeSummary: Richard Laventon於大約1320年出生在比利時安特維爾吉爾斯特倫。他至少有1個女兒。

zh-hans.Stelen, Geel, Antwerp, Belgium: 比利时安特維爾吉爾斯特倫
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Laventon于大约1320年出生在比利时安特維爾吉爾斯特倫。他至少有1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Laventon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard Laventon was born about 1320, in Stelen, Geel, Antwerp, Belgium. He had at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Laventon est né environ 1320, à Stelen, Geel, Anvers, Belgique. Il a eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Laventon wurde um 1320 in Stelen, Geel, Antwerpen, Belgien geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Laventon è nato il circa 1320 nel Stelen, Geel, Anversa, Belgio. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia.

ja.Stelen, Geel, Antwerp, Belgium: ベルギーアントウエルペンジェエルステレン
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Laventonは約1320年にベルギーアントウエルペンジェエルステレンで生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Laventon(은)는 대략 1320년 벨기에 앤트워펜 그이 스텔에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Laventon nasceu aproximadamente 1320, em Stelen, Geel, Antuérpia, Bélgica. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Laventon родился около 1320 г. в местности стелен, джил, антвирпен, Бельгия. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Laventon nació aproximadamente 1320, en Stelen, Geel, Amberes, Bélgica. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija.
